_comment: The ONE canonical source of published Stage-0 numbers. docs/RESULTS.md tables are rendered from this by surfscan/evaluation/sync_numbers.py (between <!-- results:X --> markers) so a number lives in ONE place and the docs can't drift. Curated from the measured investigation; refresh the measured entries from mlflow when reruns land. The root README stays a curated portfolio face (not synced) per CLAUDE.md.
harness: image-AUROC (detection) + pixel-AU-PRO (localization), per-category models, our runs through one harness

methods.name: DRAEM (synthesis-discriminative, crude Perlin)
methods.note: bagel xyz, 3-seed mean 0.36±0.09 au_pro / 0.61 img (the earlier single-seed 0.48 was a lucky draw). My realistic synth v2 scored LOWER (0.18) because of BROKEN GEOMETRY (world-z not surface-normal displacement), NOT because realism hurts DRAEM. Fixed v3 (normal-displaced, core/geometry.py): 0.32±0.07 au_pro (tied) + 0.79 img (wins all 3 seeds). RESOLVED 2026-07-07.

methods.name: ↳ realistic-synth v3 (normal-displaced, on DRAEM)
methods.note: bagel xyz 3-seed. Surface-normal displacement (core/geometry.grid_normals) fixed the v2 z-axis bug: au_pro tied with Perlin (0.32±0.07 vs 0.36±0.09, bands overlap), img_auroc beats Perlin on all 3 seeds (0.79 vs 0.61). See learning/2026-07-06_draem-synthesis-comparison.md.

methods.name: PatchCore (feature memory bank)
methods.paradigm: memory bank — NN to normal features

methods.name: Fused (PatchCore-rgb + BTF)
methods.note: net-neutral vs rgb-only until native-res FPFH

sota.name: DCRDF-Net
sota.cite: DCRDF-Net 2026 (PMC12846035) — current top; M3DM CVPR2023 (0.945/0.964) is the classic reference. Field cluster 2025-26: MMRD 0.950/0.976 · Shape-Guided 0.947/0.976.
